Metadata.title: Eidyn
Metadata.description: Virtual Try-On SaaS. Transform e-commerce with 3D virtual clothing try-on.

Footer.description: Transforming e-commerce with 3D virtual clothing try-on.
Footer.ctaTitle: Ready for the future of e-commerce?
Footer.ctaDescription: Create hyper-realistic 3D models of your garments in minutes and boost your conversion rate dramatically.

Home.heroSubtitle: Boost sales and reduce returns by letting your customers try on your clothes virtually before buying. Seamless integration in minutes.
Home.featuresTitle: Technology built to scale your business
Home.feature1Desc: Our AI-generated avatars adapt to your customers' exact measurements for a perfect fit.
Home.feature2Desc: Connect your Shopify, WooCommerce, or Tiendanube store without writing a single line of code.
Home.feature3Desc: Biometric data is encrypted, requires explicit consent, and expires automatically.
Home.finalCtaTitle: Ready to transform the shopping experience?
Home.finalCtaSubtitle: Join the brands already using Eidyn to revolutionize their online store.

Onboarding.step1Subtitle: Choose the profile that best describes your use case.
Onboarding.shopperDesc: I want to create my 3D avatar and try on clothes in stores.
Onboarding.storeDesc: I want to integrate the virtual try-on in my e-commerce.
Onboarding.brandDesc: I want to upload 3D garments and distribute them to stores.
Onboarding.step2Subtitle: Complete the basic information for your account.
Onboarding.freePlanFeature1: Up to 100 virtual try-ons per month.

Settings.title: Store Settings
Settings.subtitle: Manage your brand profile and store configuration.

profile.title: Brand Information
profile.slugHint: Used for your unique Eidyn API endpoint.
profile.logoHint: Paste a URL to an image. File upload coming soon.

DashboardSidebar.upgradeDesc: Unlock unlimited 3D generations and custom domains for your store.

Garments.title: 3D Garments
Garments.subtitle: Manage your store's 3D models and catalog.

empty.title: No garments yet
empty.desc: You haven't uploaded any garments yet. Add your first piece of clothing to start digitizing your catalog.

emptyGlobal.title: Catalog is empty
emptyGlobal.desc: There are no global or public 3D garments available at the moment.

new.title: Create 3D Garment
new.subtitle: Configure the physical and visual properties of your garment.

step1.title: Basic Information
step1.skuError: This SKU is already in use by another garment.

step2.title: Setup Variants
step2.subtitle: Define the colors and sizes for this garment.

step3.title: Base Model Generation
step3.subtitle: Upload flat photos so our AI can build the 3D mesh.

step4.title: Variants Editor
step4.subtitle: Fine-tune measurements for each size and upload exact textures.

requests.desc: Manage the changes and additions suggested by other stores for your 3D models.

Overview.welcome: Welcome back, {name}. Your 3D processing pipeline is ready.

APIKeys.title: API Keys
APIKeys.subtitle: Manage your API keys to securely authenticate your storefront or backend integrations with Eidyn's 3D infrastructure.
APIKeys.createNewDesc: Generate a new API key to authenticate your store's requests.
APIKeys.noKeysDesc: Generate one above to start building.
APIKeys.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this API Key? Any integrations using it will immediately stop working.

Billing.title: Plans and Billing
Billing.description: Manage your subscription, compute usage and transaction history.
Billing.currentPlanDesc: You are currently on the plan
Billing.proDesc: For growing brands with higher volume.
Billing.enterpriseDesc: For large retailers needing dedicated resources.
Billing.securityDesc: Your transactions are encrypted and processed securely.

Connections.title: Connections & API
Connections.description: Connect your store and manage your API keys.
Connections.storeDesc: Connect your Shopify or VTEX store.
Connections.apiDesc: Generate access credentials for custom developments or external CMS.
Connections.noKeys: You have no active API keys.
Connections.disconnectDesc: Are you sure you want to disconnect this store? This will stop 3D synchronization.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.subtitle: General overview of your Eidyn ecosystem.
Dashboard.viewsDesc: Impact of your models in authorized stores (last 7 days).

SizeGuides.title: Size Guides
SizeGuides.subtitle: Manage base measurements for your garments and 3D models.

noResults.title: No results
noResults.desc: We couldn't find any size guide that matches your filters.

emptyState.title: No size guides yet
emptyState.desc: Create your first size guide to standardize measurements across your products.

form.editDesc: Modify the measurements of your existing guide. Linked products will be affected.
form.newDesc: Configure the base measurements that will be used to fit 3D models to your garments' real proportions.
form.matrixDesc: All values must be in centimeters (cm).
form.selectCategoryDesc: You must choose a category in the section above so we know which standardized measurements you need to fill out.
form.error: An error occurred while saving the guide
form.errorServer: Unexpected error while communicating with the server

card.deleteConfirmDesc: You are about to delete the guide "{name}". This action cannot be undone and linked products might lose their reference.
card.emptyMatrix: This guide has no saved sizes.

SizeGuides.errorLoadingDesc: Retry in a few seconds. If the problem persists, check the database connection.
SizeGuides.noTenantDesc: You need to complete onboarding to view your size guides.

Analytics.title: Business Intelligence
Analytics.description: Monitor the performance of your 3D garments, user behavior, and the health of our infrastructure in real-time.

conversion.funnelDesc: Drop-off analysis from 3D widget visualization to final purchase.

ecosystem.adoptionDesc: Evolution of unique users interacting with 3D models this week.
ecosystem.performanceNote: WebGL performance on mobile remains stable at an average of 45 FPS, ensuring an excellent experience for most of your buyers.

health.processingDesc: Monitoring of response times for the CDN delivering .GLB files.
health.alertDesc: Based on traffic growth, we recommend configuring <str>Cloudflare R2 Tier 2</str> for next month. Concurrent download volume of 3D models could experience latencies over 500ms during weekend sales peaks.

Organization.title: Organization settings
Organization.description: Manage your company profile and overall preferences.
Organization.configDesc: Customize how the 3D viewer looks in your store.
Organization.zoomDesc: Allows users to inspect garment details up close.
Organization.assetDesc: Time until temporary 3D asset URLs expire to protect your models.
Organization.gdprDesc: Show cookie consent before loading 3D assets.

Account.title: Account Info
Account.description: Manage your personal account settings, security, and active sessions.
Account.dangerZoneDesc: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. This will permanently delete all your personal data, settings, and the link to your store or brand.

table.noProducts: No products found with that filter.

syncMessages.noNewsDesc: No new products found in your connected stores to sync.
syncMessages.successDesc: Imported or updated {count} products in your catalog. Page will refresh shortly...
syncMessages.problemDesc: Connection error when trying to sync catalog.

mapping.title: Smart Mapping (Binding)
mapping.desc: Select which base 3D model corresponds to the product
mapping.noModels: No 3D models found matching the search.
mapping.networkErrorDesc: There was a problem saving the mapping.

unmap.title: Are you sure you want to unlink?
unmap.desc: The assigned 3D model for product {name} will be removed. Customers in the store will no longer be able to use the virtual try-on for this item.
unmap.networkErrorDesc: There was a problem unlinking the product.

step1.title: Garment Identity
step1.desc: Enter the name of the garment and the SKU identifier that will be used to map the product.
step1.brandHelp: Type the brand or select an existing one. It will be formatted automatically.
step1.skuErrorUnique: This SKU already exists for your store. Please use a unique SKU.
step1.skuHelp: This code must match your product's SKU in Shopify or WooCommerce.

step2.title: Base Photo & 3D Generation
step2.desc: Upload a front and back photo of the garment. This will allow our AI to understand the shape, cut, and silhouette to generate the 3D model.
step2.processingDesc: Uploading images and preparing AI. This may take a few seconds...

step3.title: Color / Design Variants
step3.desc: The 3D model is processing. Now add the available colors or patterns for this garment.

step4.title: Size and Measurement Matrix
step4.desc: Add the real measurements of the garment so the 3D model scales automatically to each size.
step4.selectGuide: Select a size guide to autofill
step4.selectSizesDesc: Select the sizes you want to configure for this garment.
step4.fillMeasurementsDesc: Complete the measurements for each selected size.
step4.autoCompleteDesc: This will automatically fill the sizes and measurements. You can modify them later.
step4.noGuidesSaved: You don't have any size guides saved in your account. You can create them from the main 'Size Guides' menu to speed up this step in the future.

step5.title: Available Combinations
step5.desc: Select which variants are available in which sizes. Uncheck combinations that don't exist.
step5.finishDesc: Once you confirm, the 3D model generation process will start with all variants.
step5.selectCombinations: Select which Variant/Size combinations you will sell. Unchecked ones will not be shown in the store.

success.title: Garment Created Successfully!
success.desc: The base 3D model is processing in Inngest, and the textures and scales are ready for the Virtual Try-On.

GarmentEdit.title: Edit 3D Garment
GarmentEdit.subtitle: Modify the properties of your model without affecting the base 3D mesh.

errors.unexpected: Unexpected error while saving the garment

BrandDashboard.subtitle: Manage your 3D catalog and visualize the impact of your garments.

BrandGarments.title: Garments Catalog
BrandGarments.subtitle: Upload and manage your 3D models.
BrandGarments.emptyStateDesc: Start building your virtual catalog by uploading your first 3D model.
BrandGarments.communitySubtitle: Explore and use models created by others.
BrandGarments.noResultsFound: No garments found with those filters.

GarmentsNew.title: New Garment
GarmentsNew.description: Create a new 3D model with custom textures for your brand.
GarmentsNew.baseModelDesc: Choose the garment type that best fits your design.
GarmentsNew.colorAndTexturesDesc: Define base colors and upload graphics for each color variant.
GarmentsNew.editor2DDesc: Adjust position, size, and erase parts you don't need.
GarmentsNew.detailsDesc: Complete the final information to save the model.
GarmentsNew.errorSkuInUse: This SKU is already in use by another of your garments.
GarmentsNew.errorFixSku: Please fix the SKU before saving.
GarmentsNew.designDesc: Define the base color and upload your graphics for front and back.
GarmentsNew.measurementsDesc: Adjust the base parameters to achieve the perfect fit.
GarmentsNew.componentsDesc: Customize the structure of your garment.
GarmentsNew.sizeGuideDesc: Define your Base Size and scale it to generate a complete size chart automatically.
